clusters.justification: These terms collectively describe the macroscopic functional axis of emotional reactivity, valence processing, and mood state regulation inherently mapped to the amygdala and anterior insula.
This cluster captures the subjective computation of utility and goal-directed incentive processing supported heavily by frontostriatal reward circuitry.
These concepts rely on transmodal cortical hierarchies to support internally directed, abstract representations of oneself and others across time.
